rows.label: tev060401_MSG0001
rows.name:
That green smoke friends call
kridokan air and sell for big money?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060401_MSG0002
rows.name:
It can only be obtained in
caves of Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060401_MSG0003
rows.name:
Chirochiro saw it, but never
bothered bottling since it just
looked like green fart or something.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060401_MSG0004
rows.name:
But Chirochiro was wrong! So
wrong! Think of fortune
Chirochiro could have made...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060401_MSG0006
rows.name: Lot of Nopon have VERY similar problem.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060401_MSG0007
rows.name:
Stress of running from Bias and
adapting to life in new place
causes fur to fall out big time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060401_MSG0008
rows.name:
But Nopon need worry no more! Chirochiro
come up with legendary puffy-hair supercream
to make embarrassing problem go away![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060401_MSG0009
rows.name:
True, ingredients are tough to come by,
and many Nopon too shy to purchase...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060401_MSG0010
rows.name:
But Phil say Chirochiro need to run more
ethical business, so Chirochiro putting
customer needs above personal gain![ST:wait ]
